tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Acoustic version of Bruce Springsteen's Born in the U.S.A. from Tracks.

[ch]Em/G[/ch]  - 322000
[ch]Asus2[/ch] - X02200

Capo II


[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Em/G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Asus2[/ch] (x2)


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born down in a dead man's town[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
The first kick I took was when I hit the ground[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You end up like a dog that's been beat too much[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
'Til you spend half your life just covering up[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I got in a little hometown jam[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
And so they put a rifle in my hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Son, ya ever heard of Vietnam[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Well, go and kill the yellow man[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Come back home to the refineries[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Hiring man says[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
"Son, if it was up to me"[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
I go down to see the VA man[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
He says, "Son, don't you understand."[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]
Born in the U.S.A.[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I had a buddy at Khe Sahn[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Fightin' off them Vietcong[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
They're still there, he's all gone[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
He had a little girl in Saigon[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
I got a picture of him in her arms[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
      Hoo, Hoo, Hoo[/tab]


[Verse 5]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Down in the shadow of the penitentiary[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Out by the gas fires of the refinery[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I'm ten years down the road[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                
Nowhere to gun and nowhere to go [/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Hoo[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
I'm a long gone daddy in the USA[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Born in the USA[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
I'm a cool rockin' daddy in the USA[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Born in the USA      Hoo[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] 
(Repeat and fade, with a lot of hooing)[/tab]
